title: collinsia sparsiflora var. arvensis
intro: Collinsia sparsiflora var. arvensis is a variety of the plant Collinsia sparsiflora, commonly known as the slender-seeded blue eyed Mary. It is an annual herb native to North America, characterized by its blue-purple flowers and lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Collinsia sparsiflora var. arvensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, offering potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from anxiety and stress.
